description: Style Note Tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy top from Tonga has a boat neck, three quarter raglan sleeves with a broad band at the cuffs and hem Material and Care Blended fabric Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang or line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
